text.title: On-Call Rotation Bootstrap Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: draft-charter
step.input: team headcount + service SLA + customer expectations
step.action: Fill the on-call-charter.md template: shift length, tiers, ack SLA, escalation, comp, swap, owner.
step.note: Gate: If team < 5, STOP — apply external-retainer methodology instead.

step.name: publish-comp-policy
step.action: Push comp policy to HR handbook. Get engineering leader + HR signatures. Configure automatic accrual from paging-tool events.
step.note: Gate: If signatures unobtained, STOP — escalate to engineering leader.

step.name: configure-paging-tool
step.action: Commit PagerDuty/Opsgenie/Better-Stack schedule config to version control. Configure ack SLA + escalation in the tool.

step.name: onboard-via-shadow
step.action: Block solo primary in the scheduling tool until 2 shadow + 2 supervised solo recorded.

step.name: weekly-load-report
step.action: Run on-call-load-report.py weekly. Surface red-line crossings to engineering leader.
step.note: Gate: If red-line crossed, produce corrective plan.
